HOW I WORK

Three steps. Every time.

01

Understand The Problem

I sit with the team, understand the pain points, map the data flow, and identify where manual work is killing productivity.

02

Build & Automate

I build the system — dashboard, app, or automation — using Google Apps Script, ERPNext, or AI. Same day delivery, most times.

03

Deliver Before You Ask

Once live, the system runs itself. Reports go out automatically. Management gets what they need — before they ask for it.

PROJECTS

10 live systems. Built, deployed, running in production.

★ FLAGSHIP PROJECT

AI Smart Sales Dashboard

Every morning 9 AM — delegation-wise custom report in everyone's inbox. Weekly, monthly, quarterly — state/salesman/item group wise. Fully automatic. Jarvis AI answers any question.

GASChart.jsAIEmail Automation

Smart CRM System

Collection tracking, order pipeline, customer health scoring, complaint management, salesman performance — complete field operations system.

GAS3,474 CustomersPayment Aging

Purchase System (PO → GRN)

Complete purchase lifecycle — PO create, auto PDF email to vendor, GRN on receipt, status tracking. Management gets automated updates at every stage.

GAS236 POs₹13.94 Cr

Smart Vendor Quotation System

Multi-channel RFQ — send requests via Email, WhatsApp & SMS. Vendor responses auto-collected, rate comparison generated, best price auto-detected.

GAS73 Vendors654 Items

IMS — Inventory Management

Powers TMT Plus production daily. Real-time stock vs sales order matching, min/max level alerts — production without this system is not possible.

Google SheetsReal-TimeAlerts

OFR Dashboard

Order Fulfillment Rate tracking — SO demand vs dispatch vs billing, party-wise shortfall analysis, missing items detection, severity alerts.

GAS₹10.57 Cr SO83.66% OFR

Stock Taking App

Physical vs book stock reconciliation with AI insights — negative stock detection, declining items, dead stock alerts, variance analysis with corrective actions.

GAS783 ItemsAI Insights

12 Week Year Execution App

A goal execution system that compresses annual targets into 12-week cycles — weekly tactic tracking, automated scoring, and team progress monitoring.

GAS15 Employees12WY Methodology

Smart Login System

Passwordless authentication — login with just your email. Google Account based, role-based access control, admin approval workflow. No password to remember, ever.

GASPasswordlessRole-Based

Jarvis AI ChatBot

AI-powered business assistant with permanent memory and Iron Man themed UI — integrated across every system as centralized intelligence layer.

SERVICES

What I build for businesses

01

KPI Dashboard Development

Real-time dashboards using GAS, Chart.js, Power BI — sales, production, inventory & financial clarity at a glance.

02

AI-Powered Business Intelligence

Custom chatbots, automated lead gen, NLP analytics — data that talks in Hindi & English.

03

Financial Analysis & Modelling

Budgeting, forecasting, variance analysis, multi-scenario modelling — C-suite decision-ready.

04

ERP Deployment & Integration

End-to-end ERPNext on VPS — CRM, HR, Production with n8n workflow automation.

05

Process Automation

Attendance, emails, scheduled reports — if humans repeat it, I automate it permanently.

06

Custom Web Applications

Full-stack apps — inventory, vendor mgmt, CRM, QC — enterprise power at spreadsheet cost.
